flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Liability Limitations and Exclusions; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).

flags.clause_title: 5. Recipient shall take appropriate measures to ensure a level of security
flags.snippet: 5. Recipient shall take appropriate measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, including amongst other things, as appropriate: i. the encryption of the Data; ii. the ability to ensure the on-going c…
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Confidentiality; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Definition of confidential information excludes information already public, independently developed, previously known by receiving party, and information legally required to be disclosed. UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 6. The Recipient shall keep all of the Data secure from any unauthorised or
flags.snippet: 6. The Recipient shall keep all of the Data secure from any unauthorised or accidental use, access, disclosure, damage, loss or destruction. The Recipient will not permit the Data or any part of it to come into the poss…
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).

flags.snippet: 14. Any results generated in the course of the Study from the Recipient’s use of the Materials and/or Data shall be jointly owned by the Parties. Each Party may use the results for its own teaching and non-commercial re…

flags.snippet: 16. Nothing included in this Agreement shall prevent the Provider Institution from being able to distribute the Material and/or Data to other entities as described in Appendix 1. If, as per the details included in Appen…

flags.clause_title: 17. The Provider Institution has the right to terminate this agreement forthwith
flags.snippet: 17. The Provider Institution has the right to terminate this agreement forthwith at any time by means of written notice to Recipient Institution if the ethical approval is withdrawn or if the Recipient Institution is in…
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Termination; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Mutual two-way termination for material breach of contract or insolvency. Clear right of UoA to terminate for client's failure to pay. Accrued rights and benefits not affected. Client pays termination costs including any uncancellable obligations. | Acceptable: Termination for convenience acceptable ONLY for Consulting contracts, with reasonable notice, PI agreement, and client paying termination costs / uncancellable obligations. Cannot always alter termination provisions for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts (escalate to PM). | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 18. This Agreement shall not be amended except in writing by duly authorised
flags.snippet: 18. This Agreement shall not be amended except in writing by duly authorised signatories of the Parties hereto.

flags.snippet: 19. The Parties agree that this Agreement and any subsequent amendments to it shall be binding on their successors in title, and assigns, and undertake to take all necessary steps to ensure that they are so bound.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Neither party can use names or brands of the other or their personnel without prior written consent. | Escalation: University Marketing (brand@auckland.ac.nz).

flags.clause_title: 24. This Agreement shall be governed by English Law, and the English Courts shal
flags.snippet: 24. This Agreement shall be governed by English Law, and the English Courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction to deal with any dispute which may arise out of or in connection with this Letter Agreement.
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Governing Law and Jurisdiction; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: New Zealand. | Acceptable: Australia, the United Kingdom, Common European countries, Singapore. For US-based clients, non-exclusive jurisdiction of a specific US state is acceptable. | Escalation: General Counsel.

flags.clause_title: 25. This Agreement shall be effective as of the date of the last signature below
flags.snippet: 25. This Agreement shall be effective as of the date of the last signature below and shall terminate upon termination of the Study in Appendix 1 or 2 years from the effective date, whichever is sooner.

Accrued rights and benefits not affected. Client pays termination costs including any uncancellable obligations. | Acceptable: Termination for convenience acceptable ONLY for Consulting contracts, with reasonable notice, PI agreement, and client paying termination costs / uncancellable obligations. Cannot always alter termination provisions for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts (escalate to PM). | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts.
